name: Hudson Pacific Properties, Inc.
business: We are a vertically integrated real estate investment trust (REIT) offering end-to-end real estate solutions for dynamic tenants in the synergistic, converging and secular growth industries of tech and media. We acquire, reposition, develop and operate sustainable high-quality office and state-of-the-art studio properties in high-barrier-to-entry tech and media epicenters. We also acquire and operate leading production services companies to further expand the service offerings for our studio portfolio.
sellsTo: tenants in the technology and media and entertainment industries
office tenants and/or studio and production services clients

exposures.sentence: We derive a significant portion of our rental revenue from tenants in the technology and media and entertainment industries.

catalysts.event: Maturity of Office Portfolio CMBS loan
catalysts.sentence: The loan bears interest at SOFR + 4.15% and matures on April 9, 2027, with three optional one-year extensions permitting certain financial and other covenants are met.
The refinanced loan bears interest at a weighted average rate of 6.16% and matures on September 11, 2030.

We have a science-based target that commits us to go further by reducing absolute Scope 1 and 2 greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions by 50% by 2030, from a 2018 baseline, excluding financial instruments like unbundled renewable energy credits and carbon offsets.
